overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit nightclub interior. The player character walks through a bar area with prominent pink and blue neon signage, interacts with the environment, and ascends a staircase toward an upper level. The scene features a cyberpunk aesthetic with Japanese signage, stripper poles, and various NPC patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub lounge with stripper pole and neon signage

events.description: camera pans left from stripper pole area toward bar seating with TV screen
moving from blue-lit couch area into pink-lit bar counter zone

agents.ego_description: walking through the nightclub lounge, observing neon-lit interior and approaching the main bar

notable_agents.action: stripper performing on the pole near the XXX neon sign
two patrons sitting on the blue couch against the red wall

entered.detail: large pink neon XXX sign mounted on red wall above seating area
illuminated circular stage with chrome pole near the entrance
long turquoise sofa running along the left wall with patrons seated
wall-mounted television displaying news broadcast with subtitles
large neon sign combining male and female symbols in blue and pink
long illuminated bar with pink underlighting and bottle display
Japanese neon text '24時間営業' indicating 24-hour operation
backlit shelves stocked with liquor bottles behind the bar

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk nightclub interior dominated by pink and blue neon lighting. The camera pans across a stripper pole performance area with an XXX neon sign, past seated patrons on turquoise couches, and approaches a long bar counter featuring Japanese signage indicating 24-hour operation.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter with bottle display and view of club floor

events.description: dialogue interaction prompt 'Recommend anything?' appears for bartender
camera turns 180 degrees to face the club floor and entrance area

agents.ego_description: standing at the bar counter considering interaction with the bartender, then turning to survey the club interior

notable_agents.action: bartender in red outfit with hat working behind the counter
stripper continuing performance on the illuminated stage

entered.detail: round cushioned stools lined up along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the illuminated bar counter where a bartender works beneath Japanese neon signage. A dialogue option appears suggesting interaction. The camera then turns to reveal the wider club floor, showing the stripper pole in the background and patrons gathered near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating lounge area with blue couches and back staircase

events.description: moving from bar area into rear seating lounge near staircase
approaching and beginning to ascend the staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: navigating through the club past groups of seated patrons toward the back staircase

notable_agents.action: waitress in black vest and skirt walking toward the staircase
group of three patrons seated on blue couches conversing

entered.detail: carpeted stairs with illuminated handrail leading to upper level
illuminated arcade or vending machine against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the rear lounge area where patrons relax on turquoise seating. The bar area recedes from view as the player approaches a carpeted staircase with neon accent lighting. A waitress walks ahead toward the stairs while other NPCs remain seated in conversation.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell with neon accent lighting leading to upper level

events.description: ascending into dimmer upper stairwell with purple ambient wall lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the carpeted staircase following the waitress, with views down to the club floor below

notable_agents.action: waitress ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: metal door with illuminated frame at the top of the stairs
illuminated handrail running along the staircase edge

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the staircase away from the main club floor, following the waitress upward. The neon-lit railing guides the path as the club below becomes visible through the open stairwell. The segment ends as the player approaches the upper level door at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched nightclub that transitions from the bustling main bar area to a secluded upper level. It begins by panning across a performance area with pink and blue neon signs and turquoise couches before gliding toward a long bar counter adorned with Japanese signage. As the camera moves past the bartender and scans the wider club floor, the scene shifts toward the rear lounge where patrons relax in the dim light. The perspective then follows a waitress toward a carpeted staircase, leaving the main floor behind as the camera ascends along neon-lit railings. Finally, the view opens up to show the club below through the stairwell before the movement concludes at a door on the upper level.
